last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 32
last_episode_to_air.overview: Eşref, who finally sees Rüya, whom he has waited for for years, closes his eyes to everything and confronts İhtiyar's men to protect her. Meanwhile, Nisan, who watches what is happening from inside, faces a major dilemma with Rüya's appearance and begins to question the memories he believed to be real. Torn between killing Hıdır or turning İhtiyar completely against him, Kadir decides to make critical moves to get out of this situation. However, even though he thinks he has everything under control, he does not realize that he will cause terrible destruction. Nisan fears that Rüya will harm his relationships, but Eşref is already preparing to turn all these events to his advantage.

name: Esref's Dream
overview: As a child, Eşref fell in love from afar with a girl he called “Rüya” and spent years searching for her, only to become a powerful mafia figure along the way. Meanwhile, Nisan, an idealistic musician, finds herself in grave danger after performing at a wedding held at Eşref’s hotel. Eşref falls for Nisan, unaware that she is both the long-lost Rüya he has been chasing for years and a police informant. Trapped in a whirlwind of love, betrayal, and power struggles, Eşref is forced into a brutal reckoning—both with his criminal empire and his own emotions.
